scripts.test:plugin-template:smoke: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; go run ./packages/plugin-sdk/cmd/plugin-dev manifest check -plugin ./plugins/plugin-template-smoke; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; go test ./plugins/plugin-template-smoke -run 'TestPluginTemplateSmoke|TestTemplateManifestConstantsStayInSync'"
scripts.test:postgres:acceptance: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (-not $env:BOT_PLATFORM_POSTGRES_TEST_DSN) { throw 'BOT_PLATFORM_POSTGRES_TEST_DSN is required for test:postgres:acceptance' }; go test ./apps/runtime -run 'TestRuntimeAppDemoOneBotMessageWithPostgresSmokeStore|TestRuntimeAppDemoOneBotMessageWithPostgresSmokeStoreAndDirectHost|TestRuntimeAppReplayUsesPostgresSelectedBackendEventJournal|TestRuntimeAppWorkflowDemoRestoresAcrossRestartWithPostgresSelectedBackend|TestRuntimeAppPostgresSelectedOperatorWritePathsCoverPersistedOperatorSurface' -count=1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }"
scripts.lint: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $files = Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Filter *.go -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\node_modules\\' }; if ($files.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host 'No Go files found.'; exit 0 }; $unformatted = & gofmt -l $files.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if ($unformatted) { $unformatted | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }; throw 'Go files need formatting' }"
scripts.test: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $modules = @('apps/runtime','packages/event-model','packages/plugin-sdk','packages/runtime-core','adapters/adapter-onebot','adapters/adapter-webhook','plugins/plugin-echo','plugins/plugin-admin','plugins/plugin-scheduler','plugins/plugin-ai-chat','plugins/plugin-workflow-demo','tests/e2e','tests/fault-injection'); foreach ($module in $modules) { go test ./$module/...; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
scripts.format: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $files = Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Filter *.go -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\node_modules\\' }; if ($files.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host 'No Go files found.'; exit 0 }; & gofmt -w $files.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }"
